open_decisions_for_user.question: Should generalized project standards always use .agents, or should repo-specific implementation artifacts still use .codex when Codex needs local execution state?
open_decisions_for_user.recommended_default: .agents for portable standards; .codex for repo-local execution artifacts.

open_decisions_for_user.question: Should DTO mappers live in lib/mappers, lib/dto, or beside fetchers for small projects?
open_decisions_for_user.recommended_default: lib/mappers for medium/large projects; colocate in fetchers only for small prototypes.

open_decisions_for_user.question: Should static public pages always skip features, or only when they have no protected data/actions/provider operations?
open_decisions_for_user.recommended_default: Skip features only when no orchestration exists.

open_decisions_for_user.question: Should UI blocks live only in components/blocks or can namespace-specific blocks live under components/{namespace}?
open_decisions_for_user.recommended_default: Use components/blocks for cross-page reusable sections and components/{namespace} for domain-specific assemblies.

validation.notes: No repo code, QA gates, server, or config files were changed in this pass.
